'Ndrina Maio.description: The Maio are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Martino di Taurianova, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in drug trafficking, usury, and extortion. In December 2011, 21 arrest warrants were executed during Operation Tutto in famiglia, with seizure of assets.

Basilischi.description: Italian criminal organization founded in 1994 in Potenza, Basilicata, aiming to become the fifth mafia in southern Italy after Cosa Nostra, Camorra, 'Ndrangheta, and Sacra Corona Unita. It controlled illicit activities in the region but was significantly downsized after all its leaders were arrested by April 1999. Since then, the area's organized crime has been dominated by 'Ndrangheta clans from Rosarno.

descriptions: The text states 'Ndrangheta has relationships with all Italian mafias, including Basilischi.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto e ha rapporti con tutte le mafie italiane : Cosa nostra , Camorra , Banda della Magliana , Sacra Corona Unita , Basilischi .

descriptions: Saverio Mammoliti appointed Renato Martorano, who founded the Basilischi.
edges.evidence_quote: il capobastone Saverio Mammoliti avrebbe nominato capo-società Renato Martorano dove in Basilicata fondò l'organizzazione criminale dei Basilischi .

descriptions: The Pesce are one of the families that head the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: The Serraino are one of the families that head the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: Basilischi obtained approval from 'Ndrangheta clans to form their organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Ottenuto difatti il nulla osta dalle 'ndrine dei Pesce di Rosarno e dei Serraino di Reggio Calabria, si formò un gruppo di malavitosi operante in tutta la Regione con a capo Giovanni Gino Cosentino.

descriptions: Basilischi fell under the influence of 'Ndrangheta after convictions weakened the group.
edges.evidence_quote: The conviction of many high-profile members of the clan caused the group to become fractured and fall further under the influence of the more powerful Calabrian -based 'Ndrangheta .

descriptions: Basilischi are under the influence of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: One other group, the Basilischi of Basilicata region, is currently active but is considered to have mostly fallen under the influence of the larger and more powerful 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Basilischi was founded with the approval of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Basilischi is a mafia-type criminal organization active in the Basilicata region, founded in Potenza in 1994 with the approval of the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Basilischi were actually formed by Saverio Mammoliti of the Mammoliti family.
edges.evidence_quote: L'organizzazione venne effettivamente formata da Saverio Mammoliti (detto Don Saru) dei Mammoliti

descriptions: Basilischi were backed by the Morabito family.
edges.evidence_quote: con l'avallo di alcune famiglie malavitose calabresi (e segnatamente quella dei Morabito)

descriptions: Basilischi obtained approval from the Pesce clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ottenuto difatti il nulla osta dalle 'ndrine dei Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: Basilischi obtained approval from the Serraino clan.
edges.evidence_quote: e dei Serraino di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Members of Clan Scarcia are affiliated with Basilischi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono affiliati all'organizzazione dei Basilischi alcuni membri del clan Scarcia del materano

White Boy Posse.description: Canadian white supremacist neo-Nazi organized crime group founded in 2003 in Edmonton, Alberta. Primarily active in Western Canada, involved in drug trafficking, assault, and murder. Known for ties to the Hells Angels and use of Nazi symbolism.

descriptions: Crazy Dragons kidnapped and beat up members of White Boy Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2004, the Crazy Dragons first attracted media attention when the gang kidnapped and beat up five members of the White Boy Posse, a white supremacist gang.

descriptions: Hells Angels formed alliances with White Boy Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, the club has also formed alliances with various street gangs, including the Independent Soldiers, the Red Scorpions, the United Nations and the White Boy Posse, and smaller motorcycle gangs, such as Bacchus, the Gate Keepers and the Red Devils.

descriptions: Infobox lists White Boy Posse as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: White Boy Posse

descriptions: White Boy Posse is listed as a rival of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC, Manitoba Warriors, Redd Alert, White Boy Posse

descriptions: The Indian Posse has a violent rivalry with the White Boy Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian Posse has a violent rivalry with the white supremacist gang, the White Boy Posse, which serves as a puppet gang for the Hells Angels in Alberta.

descriptions: White Boy Posse is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: Infobox lists Bandidos Motorcycle Club as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos Motorcycle Club , Manitoba Warriors , Crazy Dragon Killers , Indian Posse

descriptions: Crazy Dragon Killers kidnapped and assaulted White Boy Posse members, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang first received media attention in Edmonton in 2004 after five White Boy Posse members were kidnapped and assaulted by rival gang the Crazy Dragon Killers.

descriptions: White Boy Posse founder was a close associate of Hells Angels, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The White Boy Posse was founded in the year 2003 by Sean "Fat Mike" Jackson, a close associate of the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: The White Boy Posse serves as a puppet gang for the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the white supremacist gang, the White Boy Posse, which serves as a puppet gang for the Hells Angels in Alberta.

descriptions: Infobox lists Indian Posse as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos Motorcycle Club , Manitoba Warriors , Crazy Dragon Killers , Indian Posse

descriptions: Infobox lists Manitoba Warriors as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos Motorcycle Club , Manitoba Warriors , Crazy Dragon Killers , Indian Posse

descriptions: Infobox lists Syndicate Motorcycle Club as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels Motorcycle Club Syndicate Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Faillace fought alongside Portoraro in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Forastefano e i Portoraro

'Ndrina Marando.description: The Marando are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Platì, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in drug trafficking, particularly cocaine and heroin, operating in northern Italy (Milan, Volpiano, Turin, Liguria) and Rome. The clan has been engaged in feuds with rival groups, notably the Stefanelli family. Key activities include international drug trafficking and kidnappings for ransom.

descriptions: Agresta collaborates with Marando and Trimboli in Piedmont.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i Marando e i Trimboli

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Marando 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: The Cataldo, Marando, and Sergi jointly managed a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 20 maggio 2008 vengono eseguite 48 ordinanze di custodia cautelare ad affiliati alle 'ndrine dei Cataldo, Marando e Sergi che gestivano un traffico di droga.

descriptions: Infobox lists Marando 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marafioti 'ndrina, De Stefano 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina and Marando 'ndrina

descriptions: Cataldo sourced cocaine from Marando and Sergi.
edges.evidence_quote: presunti appartenenti alla cosca dei Cataldo di Locri che si rifornivano di cocaina dai Sergi e i Marando

descriptions: Marando collaborates with Papalia in drug trafficking in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nord Italia si trovano nella zona sud di Milano in collaborazione con i Sergi e i Papalia con i quali si occupano del traffico di cocaina e eroina

descriptions: Marando was in a feud with Stefanelli in the late 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Rocco Varacalli racconta di una faida avvenuta alla fine degli anni '90 tra il vangelista Pasqualino Marando capo a Volpiano ... e le cosche liguri , in particolare gli Stefanelli

descriptions: Marando collaborated with Stefanelli in Liguria until early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: in Liguria con gli Stefanelli fino all'inizio degli anni '90

descriptions: Marando collaborates with Sergi in drug trafficking in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nord Italia si trovano nella zona sud di Milano in collaborazione con i Sergi e i Papalia con i quali si occupano del traffico di cocaina e eroina

descriptions: Marando was arrested together with Trimboli in the Igres operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002 con l' operazione Igres vengono arrestati esponenti dei Marando per traffico di droga internazionale, insieme ai Trimboli

descriptions: Sergi collaborates with Marando and Papalia in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i Marando e i Papalia con i quali si occupano del traffico di cocaina e eroina

descriptions: Sergi collaborates with Marando in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the Papalia and Marando 'ndrine, with whom they are involved in the trafficking of cocaine and heroin

descriptions: Cosa Nostra clans (Agate, Guttadauro) allied with 'Ndrangheta clans (Marando, Trimboli) for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2003 con l'operazione Igres si scopre un'alleanza per il traffico internazionale di droga tra i Marando e i Trimboli di Platì e Volpiano, dall'altra i fratelli Agate di Mazara del Vallo e i Guttadauro di Bagheria.

descriptions: Trimboli are allied with Marando in Volpiano since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Si trovano fin dagli anni '70 nel comune di Volpiano , in provincia di Torino , con cui sono alleati dei Marando e degli Agresta

descriptions: Trimboli is allied with Marando in Volpiano.
edges.evidence_quote: where they are allied with the Marando and Agresta 'ndrine

Redd Alert.description: Indigenous Canadian criminal gang operating as both a prison gang and a street gang, founded in 1999 by Robert Lee Wagner and other First Nations inmates in Alberta. They are involved in drug trafficking, assault, murder, and other crimes, primarily in Western Canada. The gang maintains alliances with the Hells Angels and other organized crime groups.

descriptions: Infobox lists Redd Alert as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Redd Alert

descriptions: Redd Alert is also listed as a rival of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC, Manitoba Warriors, Redd Alert, White Boy Posse

descriptions: Some factions of Redd Alert are allies of Indian Posse in British Columbia and Northern Territories.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: West End Gang Some factions of Redd Alert in British Columbia and Northern Territories

descriptions: ASAP is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: Redd Alert is affiliated with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert are also affiliated with the Independent Soldiers and Brothers Keepers (gang), two organized crime gangs active across Canada's Western provinces and internationally.

descriptions: Redd Alert may have originated as an offshoot of Edmonton Northside Boys, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Details on their origin are unclear but some reports say they originated as an offshoot of the Edmonton Northside Boys.

descriptions: Redd Alert has an alliance with Hells Angels and sells drugs for them.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert maintain an alliance with the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club, for whom they reportedly sell drugs.

descriptions: Redd Alert is affiliated with Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert are also affiliated with the Independent Soldiers and Brothers Keepers (gang), two organized crime gangs active across Canada's Western provinces and internationally.

descriptions: Redd Alert was founded as an alternative to joining the Indian Posse or Manitoba Warriors, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The rival Redd Alert gang were founded in Alberta's prisons by First Nations prisoners who did not want to be forced to join either the Indian Posse or the Warriors.

descriptions: Redd Alert was formed as an alternative to joining Indian Posse, indicating a non-cooperative, possibly rivalrous origin.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert was established in 1999 by Robert Lee Wagner along with other First Nations inmates of Cree, Anishinaabe, and Métis origin as an alternative to joining two of the other Aboriginal gangs within the Alberta prison system: the Indian Posse and the Manitoba Warriors.

descriptions: Kang crime family is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: Redd Alert was founded as an alternative to joining the Indian Posse or Manitoba Warriors, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The rival Redd Alert gang were founded in Alberta's prisons by First Nations prisoners who did not want to be forced to join either the Indian Posse or the Warriors.

descriptions: Redd Alert was formed as an alternative to joining Manitoba Warriors, indicating a non-cooperative, possibly rivalrous origin.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert was established in 1999 by Robert Lee Wagner along with other First Nations inmates of Cree, Anishinaabe, and Métis origin as an alternative to joining two of the other Aboriginal gangs within the Alberta prison system: the Indian Posse and the Manitoba Warriors.

descriptions: Native Syndicate is listed as an ally of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Native Syndicate, Brothers Keepers, Hells Angels, Independent Soldiers

descriptions: Red Scorpions is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: United Nations is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: White Boy Posse is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Redd Alert.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Catalano in the Turin area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel torinese con i Catalano e D'Onofrio

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Saraceno in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Saraceno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: The Saraceno clan allied with the Imerti during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

Trimboli 'ndrina.description: The Trimboli 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Platì, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1970s by the brothers Natale, Rocco, and Saverio Trimboli. It emerged as a branch of the Barbaro 'ndrina and expanded into Northern Italy, particularly Volpiano, and Australia. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and other criminal activities. It remains active, with members arrested as recently as 2010.

descriptions: Agresta collaborates with Marando and Trimboli in Piedmont.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i Marando e i Trimboli

descriptions: Trimboli 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Trimboli 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Trimboli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: Barbaro once encompassed Trimboli as a branch.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina , which during that period also encompassed the Papalia , Agresta, Trimboli , Perre, Sergi 'ndrine , among others.

descriptions: Marando was arrested together with Trimboli in the Igres operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002 con l' operazione Igres vengono arrestati esponenti dei Marando per traffico di droga internazionale, insieme ai Trimboli

descriptions: The Papalia are allied with the Trimboli.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Barbaro , dei Sergi , dei Trimboli , tutti originari di Platì .

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is allied with Trimboli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: and is allied with the Sergi , and Trimboli 'ndrine

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is allied with Trimboli 'ndrina per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , Molluso 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Papalia 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Trimboli 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Sergi 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Trimboli 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Trimboli is a sub-unit of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Trimboli 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Trimboli are allied with Agresta in Volpiano since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Si trovano fin dagli anni '70 nel comune di Volpiano , in provincia di Torino , con cui sono alleati dei Marando e degli Agresta

descriptions: Trimboli is allied with Agresta in Volpiano.
edges.evidence_quote: where they are allied with the Marando and Agresta 'ndrine

edges.evidence_quote: The Trimboli 'ndrina emerged around the 1970s as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina

edges.evidence_quote: Si trovano fin dagli anni '70 nel comune di Volpiano , in provincia di Torino , con cui sono alleati dei Marando e degli Agresta

descriptions: Trimboli is allied with Marando in Volpiano.
edges.evidence_quote: where they are allied with the Marando and Agresta 'ndrine

descriptions: Papalia is listed as an ally of Trimboli in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Sergi 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Molluso is listed as an ally of Trimboli in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Sergi 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Sergi is listed as an ally of Trimboli in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Sergi 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: ACC went to war with the Feliciano family after they made a deal with the justice system.
edges.evidence_quote: Un tiempo después iniciaron una guerra con los antiguos socios de su padre, los Feliciano, debido a que esta familia hizo un acuerdo con la justicia para salirse del proyecto paramilitar.

Jemaah Islamiyah.description: Southeast Asian Islamist militant group based in Indonesia, founded on 1 January 1993 by Abu Bakar Bashir and Abdullah Sungkar. Dedicated to establishing an Islamic state in Southeast Asia, it perpetrated the 2002 Bali bombings and other attacks. Designated as a terrorist group by the UN and multiple countries. Disbanded in 2024.

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf trained with Jemaah Islamiyah.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was reported to have trained alongside Jemaah Islamiyah militants.

descriptions: Jemaah Islamiyah was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Jemaah Islamiyah (dissolved in 2024)

descriptions: JI considered Abu Sayyaf an opponent until 2024 according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: JI has links with ASG.
edges.evidence_quote: Recruiting, training, indoctrination, financial, and operational links between the JI and other militant groups, such as al-Qaeda, the Abu Sayyaf Group (ASG), the Misuari Renegade/Breakaway Group (MRG/MBG) and the Philippine Rajah Sulaiman movement (RSM) have existed for many years.

descriptions: JI is alleged to have links to al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to al-Qaeda, the group is also alleged to have links to the Moro Islamic Liberation Front and Jamaah Ansharut Tauhid

descriptions: JI is allied with al-Qaeda according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Al-Qaeda, Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (until 2009)

edges.target: Al-Qaeda Jihad Organisation for the Malay Archipelago
descriptions: Al-Qaeda Jihad Organisation for the Malay Archipelago is a splinter group from JI.
edges.evidence_quote: in 2006 Indonesian police reported that he and Azahari Husin had split from the organisation to form "an even more hardline group" which reportedly bore the name "Al-Qaeda Jihad Organisation for the Malay Archipelago".

descriptions: JI originated from Darul Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: JI has its roots in Darul Islam (DI, meaning "House of Islam"), a radical Islamist/anti-colonialist movement in Indonesia in the 1940s.

descriptions: JI considered Free Aceh Movement an opponent until 2005 according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: JI considers Free Papua Movement an opponent according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: Jamaah Ansharut Tauhid is a splinter cell of JI.
edges.evidence_quote: Jamaah Ansharut Tauhid, a splinter cell of the JI which was formed by Abu Bakar Baasyir on 27 July 2008.

descriptions: JI was allied with LTTE until 2009 according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Al-Qaeda, Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (until 2009)

descriptions: JI has links with MRG/MBG.
edges.evidence_quote: Recruiting, training, indoctrination, financial, and operational links between the JI and other militant groups, such as al-Qaeda, the Abu Sayyaf Group (ASG), the Misuari Renegade/Breakaway Group (MRG/MBG) and the Philippine Rajah Sulaiman movement (RSM) have existed for many years.

descriptions: JI considers MILF an opponent according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

edges.evidence_quote: In addition to al-Qaeda, the group is also alleged to have links to the Moro Islamic Liberation Front and Jamaah Ansharut Tauhid

descriptions: JI considers MNLF an opponent according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: JI has links with RSM.
edges.evidence_quote: Recruiting, training, indoctrination, financial, and operational links between the JI and other militant groups, such as al-Qaeda, the Abu Sayyaf Group (ASG), the Misuari Renegade/Breakaway Group (MRG/MBG) and the Philippine Rajah Sulaiman movement (RSM) have existed for many years.

descriptions: Lo San is a rival of 14K in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was in conflict with the Grasso family after the murder of Fiore Graziano.
edges.evidence_quote: l'omicidio del boss-sindaco Fiore Graziano - avvenuto nel settembre del '72 ad opera della famiglia Grasso -, un omicidio eccellente che aveva dato il via al conflitto Grasso-Graziano.

descriptions: Mammoliti and Rugolo are related and form the Mammoliti-Rugolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mammoliti sono una 'ndrina potente di Oppido Mamertina e Castellace quali fanno capo i Rugolo , i Nava, i Cosoleto, i Luppino e i Romeo con loro imparentate.

Cartel de Buga.description: Colombian drug trafficking organization named by the DEA, led by Ramón Quintero Sanclemente and Duffay Gutiérrez. It was a rival of the Cali Cartel and operated primarily in the Valle del Cauca region. The group was involved in cocaine trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. It was dismantled around 2012.

descriptions: Cartel de Buga and Cartel de Cali were armed rivals in the mid-1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: El nombre de " cartel " se le dio, principalmente, en contraste con el así llamado Cartel de Cali , quien fue su principal rival, a partir del enfrentamiento armado que tuvieron estas dos organizaciones a mediados de la década de los 90s.

descriptions: Cartel de Buga was allied with Cartel del Norte del Valle.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cartel del Norte del Valle . Cartel de Sinaloa .

descriptions: Cartel de Buga was allied with Cartel de Sinaloa.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cartel del Norte del Valle . Cartel de Sinaloa .

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: avvenuta ad Acerra (NA), il 1º maggio del 1992 in ambito della faida tra i Di Paolo-Carfora ed i Crimaldi-Tortora

edges.source: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
edges.target: Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

edges.source: Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple
edges.target: Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

edges.source: Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

descriptions: Tariq Gidar Group is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Tariq Gidar Group

descriptions: Street Misfitz MC is a support club of Sin City Deciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the group's support clubs include the Street Misfitz MC, Black Angels MC, So Solid Ryders MC, Ridin’ Like We Stole It MC, and Chauns MC.

descriptions: Joint Darfur Force has been an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Joint Darfur Force (from 2023)

descriptions: Kent chapter created the Patriots as a puppet club.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kent chapter of the Hells Angels opened up a puppet club in 1997 called the Patriots that was only open to current or former servicemen.

descriptions: Patriots originated from Soldier Blue, which was renamed.
edges.evidence_quote: The Patriots had its origins in another Hells Angels puppet club founded in the 1980s called Soldier Blue that was only open to members of the British Army.

Miri clan.description: Organized crime cartel in Germany, primarily active in Bremen, Essen, and Berlin. Founded in the 1980s by Mhallami refugees from Syria, Turkey, and Lebanon. Engages in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, protection rackets, and prostitution. Estimated 8,000-10,000 members nationwide. Still active.

descriptions: Al-Zein and Miri clan are allies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Miri-Clan

descriptions: Miri clan member murdered a member of the Al-Zein crime family, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024 a 34-year old Miri clan member murdered a men of the rival Al-Zein crime family on a public street in Stade, close to Hamburg.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bandidos MC as rivals of the Miri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Hells Angels MC as allies of the Miri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Al-Zein clan , Hells Angels MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Mongols MC as rivals of the Miri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos MC , Mongols MC

descriptions: Miri-Clan members founded the Mongols Bremen chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: A German chapter of the Mongols MC was founded in Bremen by members of the local crime syndicate run by Lebanese immigrants in 2010.

descriptions: The Mandalari are allies of the Novella.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Novella

descriptions: The Sia alliance included Novella in the feud against Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio- Novella - Vallelunga e i Gallace - Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: Vallelunga and Novella were allies against Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio in the second boschi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 ... tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: Novella was part of the Sia alliance feuding with Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio- Novella - Vallelunga e i Gallace - Ruga-Metastasio

Capriati clan.description: The Capriati clan is a criminal organization originating from Bari, Italy, active since the 1980s. Founded by Antonio Capriati, it is primarily involved in extortion and drug trafficking, operating mainly in the historic center of Bari. The clan has attempted to expand into other areas and infiltrate the economic fabric of the city. In 2023, a major operation dismantled its hierarchical structure, leading to numerous arrests.

descriptions: Capriati clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Mancuso 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , Camorra , Capriati clan , Parisi-Palermiti clan

descriptions: Piromalli and Capriati were involved together in illegal online betting.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Galassia ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce-Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi e a criminali pugliesi (clan Capriati e Parisi) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online

descriptions: Antonio Capriati had close ties with 'Ndrangheta for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: aveva stretti legami con la 'Ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Bellocco 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: Di Cosola clan is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: Mercante-Diomede clan is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: The Parisi-Palermiti clan supported the Capriati clan in an illegal gambling operation.
edges.evidence_quote: the creation of a real holding company for illegal gambling that had generated an estimated turnover of €1 billion and also had the support of Tommaso Parisi, son of Savino Parisi , head of the Parisi-Palermiti clan , a historic ally of the Capriati clan.

descriptions: Clan Parisi is a historical ally of Clan Capriati, providing support.
edges.evidence_quote: ha avuto anche il sostegno di Tommaso Parisi, figlio di Savino Parisi, boss del clan Parisi, storico alleato dei Capriati.

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Strisciuglio clan

descriptions: Feuds between Capriati and Strisciuglio for control of the old city.
edges.evidence_quote: faide tra i clan Capriati e Strisciuglio per il controllo della città vecchia

descriptions: Laraspata clan started a feud against Capriati in Bari Vecchia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan guidato dai fratelli Donato e Raffaele Laraspata aprì una faida contro i Capriati a Bari Vecchia

descriptions: Operation against both clans confirmed use of initiation rituals, implying cooperation or shared practices.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 16 giugno 2018 si conclude un'operazione contro i clan Mercante-Diomede e Capriati in cui viene confermato l'uso di questi riti.

descriptions: The Mercante family was close to the Capriati clan.
edges.evidence_quote: i Mercante, vicina al potente clan Capriati

descriptions: Parisi and Capriati clans jointly set fire to Teatro Petruzzelli in 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: la notte del 27 ottobre 1991 i clan Parisi e Capriati incendiarono il celebre Teatro Petruzzelli di Bari

descriptions: The Capriati clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Capriati clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Capriati clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan originated as a splinter from Capriati clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminal organization was born at the late 1990s as an offshoot of another clan operating in Bari, the Capriati clan.

'Ndrina Bruni.description: The 'Ndrina Bruni is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, based in Cosenza, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of businesses. Key members include Michele Bruni, arrested in 2009, and Luca Bruni, who disappeared in 2012. The clan has been targeted in major police operations, including a 2010 arrest of 49 people.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Bruni is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Bruni è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cosenza.

descriptions: The Vice Lords consolidated the Braves into their nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang was successfully consolidating smaller neighborhood gangs (including the Cherokees, the Morphines, the Commanches, the Continental Pimps, the Imperial Chaplains, the Clovers, the Cobras, and the Braves) into the Vice Lord Nation.

descriptions: The 32 County Sovereignty Movement is the political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Bernadette Sands McKevitt, sister of hunger striker Bobby Sands and a founder of the RIRA's political wing, the 32 County Sovereignty Movement

descriptions: The 32 County Sovereignty Movement is a political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA also has political wings: the 32 County Sovereignty Movement (formerly the 32 County Sovereignty Committee), led by Francis Mackey, and unregistered political party Saoradh, led by Brian Kenna.

Fucked For Life.description: Swedish criminal network founded by Daniel Maiorana in the late 1990s, originally named Tumba Lords. Based in Tumba, Stockholm, the group engages in car thefts, motorcycle thefts, armed robberies, and drug trafficking. Membership is estimated at around 40 individuals, with a core of 12 men.

descriptions: The Serb mafia is allied with Fucked For Life.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: Byrd Gang has a rivalry with St Bernard Projects according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

Nuova Famiglia.description: The Nuova Famiglia was an Italian Camorra confederation created in the late 1970s to oppose Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata. It was headed by powerful Camorra bosses including Carmine Alfieri, the Nuvoletta brothers, Michele Zaza, Luigi Giuliano, and Antonio Bardellino. The organization was active primarily in Campania and had ties with the Sicilian Mafia. It engaged in various criminal activities such as drug trafficking, murder, and extortion until its dissolution in the 1990s.

descriptions: Alfieri clan was a founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: He was an important founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance (NF) that was formed to contrast the growing power of Raffaele Cutolo 's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) in the early eighties.

descriptions: Clan Alfieri was a member of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 1979 ed il 1981 si ha una confederazione di clan camorristici, chiamata la Nuova Famiglia , in cui confluivano i Nuvoletta , il clan dei Casalesi con Antonio Bardellino , Umberto Ammaturo , il clan Galasso e il clan Alfieri

descriptions: Founder Ferdinando Cesarano worked for Nuova Famiglia as a killer.
edges.evidence_quote: he was a ruthless killer working for the Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Cesarano was part of Nuova Famiglia until the mid-1980s, then left.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella metà degli anni '80 Cesarano, oramai un boss affermato, dopo la sconfitta della Nuova Camorra Organizzata e la dissoluzione della vincente Nuova Famiglia, si stacca anch'egli dalla Nuova Famiglia e si mette in proprio.

descriptions: Cava joined the Nuova Famiglia in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Cava clan joined the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: e dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Casalesi clan allied with Nuova Famiglia during the Camorra war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a founding component of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ad Antonio Bardellino e gli altri clan di camorra dell'agro aversano, costituì la cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Casalesi were decreed to belong to the Nuova Famiglia alliance in 1986.
edges.evidence_quote: un primo riconoscimento dell'esistenza dell'organizzazione si ebbe nel 1986 con la sentenza del Tribunale di Santa Maria Capua Vetere nei confronti di Aldo Alessandri (conosciuto anche come " processo Bardellino ") che si concluse con diverse condanne e decretò l'appartenenza del clan alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan, through its leader, was a leading member of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: He was one of the leaders of the Nuova Famiglia, created in the 1980s to face the rising power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Mario Fabbrocino contributed to the founding of the Onorata fratellanza.
edges.evidence_quote: Si presume che l'8 dicembre del 1978 Mario Fabbrocino , detto ' o gravunaro , abbia contribuito alla nascita della cosiddetta Onorata fratellanza

descriptions: Mario Fabbrocino was one of the promoters of the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino ... fu uno dei promotori dell'organizzazione " Nuova Famiglia " , la quale fronteggiava la Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Clan Galasso expanded into Salerno province on behalf of Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: anche su interesse della Nuova Famiglia , ebbe un'estensione anche nella provincia di Salerno .

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri clan joined the Nuova Famiglia to fight Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: confluiti a pieno organico nella Nuova Famiglia per combattere Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Nuvoletta-Gionta alliance fought against the rest of the Nuova Famiglia from 1983 to 1985.
edges.evidence_quote: faida all'interno della Nuova Famiglia : combattuta tra i Nuvoletta - Gionta e la Nuova Famiglia (Alfieri, Galasso, Fabbrocino, Bardellino e Vastarella) negli anni 1983-85

descriptions: Clan Gionta sided with the Nuova Famiglia against Cutolo's NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: affiancandosi alla Nuova Famiglia nella lotta contro il disegno criminale di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Giuliano brothers joined the Nuova Famiglia to fight Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo contesto i fratelli Giuliano si inseriscono stabilmente nell'organizzazione detta Nuova Famiglia , creata con il solo intento di distruggere Cutolo.

descriptions: Giuliano clan was a founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The clash ... led to the formation of the Nuova Famiglia, consisting particularly of the Giuliano clan, the Zaza clan, then headed by Michele Zaza, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with Nuova Famiglia against NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Matrone clan succeeded the Nuova Famiglia after its dissolution.
edges.evidence_quote: After the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia, Francesco Matrone, headed one of the most powerful clans

descriptions: Mazzarella was part of Nuova Famiglia, fighting Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: dando così il via alla guerra con la federazione della Nuova Famiglia , ai vertici della quale vi erano anche i fratelli Mazzarella

descriptions: The Nuvoletta-Gionta alliance fought against the rest of the Nuova Famiglia from 1983 to 1985.
edges.evidence_quote: faida all'interno della Nuova Famiglia : combattuta tra i Nuvoletta - Gionta e la Nuova Famiglia (Alfieri, Galasso, Fabbrocino, Bardellino e Vastarella) negli anni 1983-85

descriptions: Clan Nuvoletta was a member of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: La guerra è combattuta dai cutoliani e dagli affiliati della Nuova Famiglia in cui, oltre al clan di Bardellino e quello dei Nuvoletta

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nuvoletta clan first began to appear in the news at the same time the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed.

descriptions: Giovanni Pecoraro allied with Pasquale Galasso, boss of the Nuova Famiglia.

edges.evidence_quote: ai Serino (affiliati alla Nuova Famiglia)

descriptions: The Vangone-Limelli were part of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: come i Gionta, i Limelli-Vangone erano integranti con la Nuova Famiglia.

descriptions: Contini clan joined the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: he joined the Nuova Famiglia confederation against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Lo Russo clan merged into the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: After its formation, it immediately merged into the Nuova Famiglia (NF), a federation of Anti-Cutolo Camorra clans

descriptions: Moccia clan was a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Moccia clan was always a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia in the war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The text states that the NCO and NF were rival organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: He had made the same deal with Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO), as well as with the rival organization of the Cutolo, the Nuova Famiglia (NF) headed by Carmine Alfieri.

descriptions: NF was formed to oppose NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: the formation of the Nuova Famiglia (NF) to contrast Cutolo's predominant NCO

descriptions: NCO was at war with the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: This savage war caused ... the Sicilian Mafia to accommodate an agreement between the two warring clans, favouring the Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Organizzata and Nuova Famiglia are opposing factions in the Camorra conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: il professore infatti, nella sua qualità di psichiatra forense, si era adoperato per la scarcerazione di affiliati alla Nuova Famiglia, per poi accettare l'incarico come consulente anche per la fazione opposta

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to counter the expansion of the NCO.
time_periods: tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo (late 1970s-early 1980s)
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri — concepita per contrastare l’espansione della NCO sul territorio campano.

descriptions: NCO and NF were in conflict with each other.
edges.evidence_quote: durante la lotta tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) e Nuova Famiglia (NF)

descriptions: The NCO and the Nuova Famiglia fought a violent war from 1978 to 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra la NCO e la Nuova Famiglia : guerra che scoppiò dopo che l'8 dicembre 1978 le principali famiglie malavitose napoletane decisero di confederarsi in un unico cartello denominato Nuova Famiglia per combattere lo strapotere di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The two organizations were at war in 1982.
edges.evidence_quote: nel 1982 durante la guerra tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata e Nuova Famiglia fu ucciso il fratello di Giuseppe Puca detto o Giappone , Aniello Puca.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was created specifically to fight and eliminate the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine del 1978 nasce la cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia , formatasi da una precedente alleanza denominata "Onorata Fratellanza", una confederazione di clan creata ad hoc per eliminare i cutoliani.

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia infiltrated the NCO, indicating conflict between the two organizations.

Chichesters.description: The Chichesters were an Irish-American street gang based in the Five Points area of New York City, founded by John Chichester in the 1820s. They engaged in theft, illegal gambling, and robbery, and were allies of the Dead Rabbits against the Bowery Boys. The gang lasted for over 50 years before being absorbed by the Whyos after the American Civil War in 1865.

descriptions: The Bowery Boys were rivals of the Chichesters.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Dead Rabbits, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Tammany Hall
